overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's urban environment. The player moves along sidewalks past futuristic architecture, crosses a busy intersection, and ascends a concrete stairway into a shadowed upper level, with the iconic Arasaka Tower visible in the distance throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with corporate and industrial buildings

events.description: white sedan drives past on the right side of the street
approaching intersection and beginning to cross the street with pedestrian group

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward the intersection, following pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and white shorts walking ahead of ego
white sedan driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: large dark building with striking geometric angular facade and repeating patterns
tall iconic glass and steel corporate tower with distinctive futuristic architecture visible in the distance
low-rise industrial building with red facade and large garage doors
tall street pole with horizontal orange illuminated bar

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit sidewalk in a futuristic urban environment, with a massive dark angular building on the left and an iconic glass corporate tower visible in the distance. Pedestrians walk ahead while vehicles pass on the multi-lane road to the right, and the camera approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crossing and open plaza with parking structure

events.description: crossing the intersection and transitioning to the opposite sidewalk
turning slightly right toward the concrete parking structure and stairway

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection alongside a group of pedestrians, then continuing along the far sidewalk toward the parking structure

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians in casual clothing crossing the street together

entered.detail: multi-level concrete parking garage with yellow safety railings and industrial aesthetic
circular floating holographic advertisement display mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the scene opens into a wider plaza area with a concrete parking structure on the right featuring yellow railings. A holographic billboard floats near the parking entrance, while the corporate tower remains visible to the left. The camera continues forward before turning toward a stairway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway ascending to shadowed upper parking level

events.description: entering the concrete stairway and beginning ascent to upper level
moving from bright sunlight into deep shadow under the parking structure overhang

agents.ego_description: walking up the steep concrete stairs with yellow railings, transitioning from the sunlit street into a shadowed industrial upper level

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light clothing descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: steep concrete staircase with bright yellow safety railings leading upward
large mechanical ventilation units and industrial equipment on top of the parking structure

segments.scene_description: Ascending the concrete stairway with yellow railings into a shadowed upper level beneath the parking structure. The lighting shifts dramatically from bright sun to deep shadow as the camera climbs, revealing industrial machinery on the rooftop above and the corporate tower now centered in the view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a sunlit futuristic city that gradually transitions into a shadowed industrial upper level. It begins by walking along a bright sidewalk past a massive angular building and flowing traffic, with a distant glass corporate tower anchoring the horizon. As the camera crosses a busy intersection, the environment opens into a wider plaza featuring a concrete parking structure with yellow railings and a floating holographic billboard. The scene then shifts toward a stairway entrance, where the camera ascends the concrete steps and the lighting transforms dramatically from brilliant sunlight to deep shadow. Finally, the climb reveals industrial machinery on the rooftop above as the corporate tower becomes centered in the view.
